name: Tiffany Shedd
subject: Small Business/Payroll Protection-What you need to know: Join CD1 Candidate Tiffany Shedd & Congressman Markwayne Mullin (OK-2)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Handel for Congress, Inc
body:
Hello Friends, **Please join me for a Conference Call with Congressman Markwayne Mullin (OK-2) on Monday, April 6th at 2:00PM (AZ Time) to address important topics affecting small business owners during this crisis and to answer your questions. ** As a small business owner, attorney, farmer, and mom, I know all of us are facing challenging times and are trying to keep up with the quickly evolving challenges COVID-19 is having on our personal lives and businesses. Congressman Mullin has agreed to share accurate and detailed information with us to help navigate these challenges. He is extremely qualified on subjects we are all trying to figure out. As a member of the [House Energy and Commerce Committee](http://links.sheddforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=13afc657f50e40f4bda3c48df8c637d3&_e=LgctQPQcs5Xsah8w5akiklJcskipfGva2BsIWa_OnLGIOtAwA9y7CzBShxTPfp4amWx6BtH6dOW5BwrbSBw8wf5DRkiHuL41qFtybPqCfN3SFSRQbIWZhKHzpHZFEFUj9WUVMJ6mL_DMJLkfPJQ_ytOKmvR5a1efkzHxvelk88ZKwvYeL9F8KVeuA4zrUFnu5kI1HaZjCqTBCJF8F9Ia6MAhlZn3VU796wzS87BYMLtigBOOYbUuNYywAAiCBsk8DEDYppYjy8e986xTjyLnxA%3D%3D) _(which is one of the committees on the front lines of dealing with COVID-19)_ and the owner of multiple businesses ranging from plumbing to restaurants to ranching, he has valuable knowledge to share. Congressman Mullin serves on the House Energy and Commerce Committee whose broad jurisdiction includes energy and environmental policy, health care, commerce, and manufacturing. Additionally, Mullin is a co-chair of the Indian Heath Services Task Force and the Vice-Chair of the Native American caucus. During his time in the U.S. House of Representatives, Mullin has been a strong voice for business owners across Oklahoma, bringing their perspective into the national debate on many issues that directly impact the business community. As one of only four Native Americans currently serving in the House, Mullin brings a firsthand knowledge of Native American issues to Washington, D.C. Mullin also serves as a member of the [Republican Whip Team](http://links.sheddforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=13afc657f50e40f4bda3c48df8c637d3&_e=LgctQPQcs5Xsah8w5akikloJ9fquazSmtRxkuSOCi6CrTmVaJYj1Da7tYdNHbAkaCI1LOke_cPLrtq-a63Td4WDKWwaNGlDwknr8njWGTFxwsIsrHiyN4BNLWA6nXO1zugHNPYGBSpQ2kEjEZyN68tMtSTbDFUKS_5bpWvg8DoBZbVDROdj3J3fAlzMjVukqUOIi-mvfM0NljpeCc_g1mlRMhfx878Vl6b_gNZEVHJqoQ6bP7qHMOnrrVIkEzb8Ie1Te4yCbtx5oGdI6wdW1Cg%3D%3D). Representatives who are members of this team work closely with Republican leadership to ensure every American’s voice is heard in Congress. I hope you can join us, and please feel free to share this invitation with anyone you think would benefit by this call. **Date:** Monday, April 6th
**Time: ** 2:00PM to 3:00PM AZ Time As a candidate for Arizona CD1, I am talking to many people across the state. CD1 is a vast, diverse district. When I realized many people are seeking information that I have access to, I set up this call to share knowlege with you. For more information about my campaign, please visit: [www.sheddforcongress.com](http://links.sheddforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=13afc657f50e40f4bda3c48df8c637d3&_e=oIJx5xnQnQlq6ZqjqVLzR0U3vpoWKH-9TrpKy3rH4-JEQtja2Vo7uWnD5L5vE6-xSEJ81ChK1zts_LAJQfHGDTaG71bd7Ia8eipty9T6_GdixQAq4WiuNWb26-EU55cl-aujYde4t1g1vTNqCjpeWNhZA7qWZ1WoNqENJGCiO_Uw7ayGTBms2qfK4QN_ma_d_c3jRqEa_oEAb58H5_gMnvcMDudrg9KlxvvPY_6VBX0KV56ncADEZ4aFV7e2SmfFnZPet5Iw23g_p9pwMBVR2g%3D%3D). ***Please confirm your participation by replying to this email. You will receive call information within 24 hours of your confirmation.*** I look forward to talking with you Monday! Warm Regards, Tiffany Shedd Shedd for Congress

If our residents aren’t properly counted, or members of our community are missed during the counting period, we might not receive the resources we need to support our diverse and growing population. **While you can complete the Census over the phone or by mail, for the first time ever you can also respond online.[Here’s the link to make sure you and your household are properly counted.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16919867/180213984/-557522054?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmJlNTM3Yy02Yjc3LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wVXPTnx05AYTkt90MNixZVcczIq8o5F6L3QkkqJhg1M=&emci=ec3448ed-5f77-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=afbe537c-6b77-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9814644)** | [COMPLETE THE CENSUS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16919868/180213985/-557522054?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmJlNTM3Yy02Yjc3LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wVXPTnx05AYTkt90MNixZVcczIq8o5F6L3QkkqJhg1M=&emci=ec3448ed-5f77-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=afbe537c-6b77-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9814644)

There is **no cost** to fill out the Census, and it will **not** ask for your social security number or immigration status. Your personal information is kept confidential and will **not** be shared with law enforcement.
It is critical that every resident and household in our country is properly counted, and the Census is a big part of ensuring necessary resources are allocated fairly.
**So, if you haven’t yet already,[we hope you’ll take the 10 minutes to complete the 2020 Census](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16919869/180213986/-557522054?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmJlNTM3Yy02Yjc3LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wVXPTnx05AYTkt90MNixZVcczIq8o5F6L3QkkqJhg1M=&emci=ec3448ed-5f77-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=afbe537c-6b77-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9814644) \-- for you, your neighbors, our schools, our roads and so much more.**
Thanks for doing your part,
\-- Margaret

Here’s the harsh reality we face: we’re not relying on wealthy donors or well-connected establishment groups like our opponents do to fund our campaign.
#
I’m going to be honest with you — I’m getting a little worried.
Each week, we set a minimum online fundraising goal to keep up with our campaign expenses, pay our staffers, and pay off our bills. **But this week, we’ve raised less than half that amount. **
We understand that these are difficult times for a lot of families. **[But if you can afford to spare $5 or even $3 to our campaign, it’d make a huge difference in helping us stay on track with our finances.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16920392/180220082/-608349575?refcode=em20200405&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzFjMWEyMy02Zjc3LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IXyom30zDazgXAheQkp8WbbrL5-1d4eXpPvJJAlUHWE=)**

**We’re proud of that.** There’s no such thing as a small donation to us — every dollar you give means so much to us and reminds us who we’re fighting for in this election.
The only way we’re going to create the change we’ve dreamed of for so long for our families and our communities is if we fight together and remain focused on our goals this election.

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: My ask: support Michigan's healthcare workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
In recent weeks, many of you have reached out asking how you can help our country's healthcare workers who are quite literally on the frontlines of the COVID-19 outbreak. This email comes from my hear Elissa Slotkin for Congress | | | |
---

| | Friend, In recent weeks, many of you have reached out asking how you can help our country's healthcare workers who are quite literally on the frontlines of the COVID-19 outbreak. **This email comes from my heart, and was written as a response to those of you who are looking to help.** As you likely know, Michigan is being hit particularly hard by this virus: as of today, we have the fourth highest number of cases in the country, just behind New York, New Jersey, and California, but we don't have nearly the hospital and healthcare capacity as those states. My phone lines are filled with doctors, nurses, and first responders pleading for supplies. Seeing the need, Michiganders have seriously stepped up -- we have had waves of donations of equipment from our amazing research universities, nail salons, and every business in between. Michigan's manufacturers have also stepped in to fill gaps: GM and Ford are making ventilators, auto parts suppliers are making masks, Carhartt is making gowns, and our distilleries are cranking out hand sanitizer. This hardest of moments has demonstrated Michigan's legendary industry and it makes me exceptionally proud to watch how our state is pulling together. But there is still an immense need at our hospitals, and our healthcare workers are making tremedous sacrifices to support the COVID-19 response. **That 's why, if you are able, I'd ask that you consider a donation to the special funds our hospital foundations have set up to support their healthcare staff**. I have personally spoken with the directors of development at these hospital foundations, and your support will go toward emergency supplies and direct support to staff who are now facing increased expenses such as childcare, or the need to rent a hotel room to stay in as they isolate from their families. Three of the hospital foundations listed below are located in my district, and as the virus spreads across Michigan they are experiencing an ever-increasing number of cases. The other one, Henry Ford, serves metro Detroit and many constituents in Michigan's eighth district, and are already at capacity with COVID-19 patients.**I encourage you to pick the hospital foundation you identify with the most, and make a donation.** **Please also feel free to copy and paste these links into your social media feed and encourage others (especially those Michiganders!) to donate.**
[ Henry ford health system ](https://secure.elissaforcongress.com/page/m/7ec72e46/4e5e63e6/74c9360c/6d2a9762/1631486236/VEsH/?g=sbLwD1Nw52hePREDDGBmRZA "https://secure3.convio.net/hfordh/site/Donation2;jsessionid=00000000.app30116b?df_id=2842&mfc_pref=T&2842.donation=form1&NONCE_TOKEN=68787AF7D8ABEA7DF3346559B71E90F7")
---
_Henry Ford is headquartered in Detroit, has a network of urban and suburban locations serving the most vulnerable_

[ McLaren ](https://secure.elissaforcongress.com/page/m/7ec72e46/4e5e63e6/74c9360c/6d2a9763/1631486236/VEsE/?g=sbLwD1Nw52hePREDDGBmRZA "https://www.mclaren.org/lansing-foundation/documents-and-links/foundation-covid19-donations-7603?fbclid=IwAR3PcpYN2jUeOdfK8rn2hFuq3HEiNu7GinKE5AameWjsJh-JrEeC1lPbowQ")
---
_McLaren Lansing, serving urban and suburban patients_

[ sparrow ](https://secure.elissaforcongress.com/page/m/7ec72e46/4e5e63e6/74c9360c/6d2a9760/1631486236/VEsF/?g=sbLwD1Nw52hePREDDGBmRZA "https://www.sparrowfoundation.org/covidchallengeresponse")
---
_Sparrow Lansing, a public hospital treating the most vulnerable_

[ st. joseph mercy ](https://secure.elissaforcongress.com/page/m/7ec72e46/4e5e63e6/74c9360c/6d2a9761/1631486236/VEsC/?g=sbLwD1Nw52hePREDDGBmRZA "https://giving.stjoeshealth.org/sjml-covid-19-response-donation-form")
---
_St. Joseph Mercy of Brighton/Howell, the only hospital in a rural county_

The COVID-19 pandemic is a generational event -- right up there with 9/11 and so many other crisis moments in our country. We have come together before to get through tough times, and we are doing that again now. I wish you health, fortitude, and strength to get through the days ahead.

Thanks for reading,

\- Elissa

body:
As so many of us face economic uncertainty, and as unemployment numbers continue to rise, one thing no one should have to worry about is access to quality health care.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16925954/180280250/2144380653?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTMwNjliNC04Nzc3LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eciy_1v-c9FMUyvwy3KfaLB2Pj0HbLGZCY9JwCmdQtw=&emci=0ee28ec0-5c77-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=e13069b4-8777-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249) _We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. name: Team Green
subject: Have you been counted?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Vo4dIVU8FN5_AdrP7M8IV9P4m2pfpuS8QiQldg_zrDg=/4m-Rk8k8UO8Ti5yh4LH1JFu5N9TzDuUis6Yc7EbcfqE=)
---
| Team, Making sure everyone is counted in the census is absolutely critical -- and here's why: **The Census determines how federal funding gets allocated for the next 10 years.** That means funding for education, health care, housing, emergency services, and more is at stake. And if all of our residents are not properly counted, we might not receive the resources we need to support our diverse and growing population. **While you can complete the Census over the phone or by mail, for the first time ever you can also respond online.[Here's the link to make sure you and your household are properly counted.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Vo4dIVU8FN5_AdrP7M8IV9P4m2pfpuS8QiQldg_zrDg=/EMpodh6xs55-Zc3CRhDhe2ZjcywNBB-OBCZWS1BF0FM=)** | **[COMPLETE THE CENSUS ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/Vo4dIVU8FN5_AdrP7M8IV9P4m2pfpuS8QiQldg_zrDg=/EMpodh6xs55-Zc3CRhDhe2ZjcywNBB-OBCZWS1BF0FM=)**
---
There is **no cost** to fill out the Census, and it will **not** ask for your social security number or immigration status. Your personal information is kept confidential and will **not** be shared with law enforcement.
It is critical that every resident and household in our country is properly counted, and the Census is a big part of ensuring necessary resources are allocated fairly.
**So, if you haven 't yet already, [we hope you'll take the 10 minutes to complete the 2020 Census](https://act.myngp.com/el/Vo4dIVU8FN5_AdrP7M8IV9P4m2pfpuS8QiQldg_zrDg=/EMpodh6xs55-Zc3CRhDhe2ZjcywNBB-OBCZWS1BF0FM=) \-- for you, your neighbors, our schools, our roads and so much more.**
Thanks for doing your part,
\-- Team Green
* * *
| | Congressman Al Green has served the people of Texas' 9th district for 15 years. He is a progressive leader in Washington and was the first Member of Congress to introduce articles of impeachment against President Trump on the House floor.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because we want to keep you fully informed about Al's work for justice, accountability, and progress. If you'd prefer not to hear from us, you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/Vo4dIVU8FN5_AdrP7M8IV9P4m2pfpuS8QiQldg_zrDg=/WLOY15kwgIyRdhyzgFJOrxJ2sKgqk8N_7WRIN7g9Mr8=) here.
---

| Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress

Houston TX 77256-6761 United States

body:
No American should have to choose between exercising their right to vote and protecting their health. However, unless we implement a universal Vote by Mail option soon, millions of voters will be faced with this lose-lose scenario.
**That 's why I'm demanding all 50 states provide voters with a Vote by Mail option. **
It's contradictory to urge folks to social distance at home, while still expecting them to vote in crowded polling places. A universal Vote by Mail option is the most effective way to maintain democratic participation in this time of crisis.
**[Can I count on you to protect voters ' safety and well-being by signing this Vote by Mail petition?](https://act.myngp.com/el/t4u60DA6skV1EQU-w73xkFjckxI1guqsm2zv_8zHlxU=/3qayYGF1OUATYVJllx3NJsZZsWgc4nQ8qJZ5y3nxeiw=)**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/t4u60DA6skV1EQU-w73xkFjckxI1guqsm2zv_8zHlxU=/3qayYGF1OUATYVJllx3NJsZZsWgc4nQ8qJZ5y3nxeiw=)
Mail-in elections are also associated with higher voter turn out! During the 2018 primary, states that enacted Vote by Mail saw a 15% higher median turnout than in-person voting states.
So, not only would a Vote by Mail option keep Americans safer during this health crisis, but it would also help democratic participation -- _**a WIN-WIN!**_
[Demand every American have the option to Vote by Mail | SIGN YOUR NAME>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/t4u60DA6skV1EQU-w73xkFjckxI1guqsm2zv_8zHlxU=/3qayYGF1OUATYVJllx3NJsZZsWgc4nQ8qJZ5y3nxeiw=)

http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=3cc13bc332-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-3cc13bc332-25822489
Hello

I hope this finds you healthy. As I type this, I just saw a news article that another eight Iowans have passed away due to COVID-19. Please keep their families in your prayers.

I've called many Iowans this last week. The conversation always turns to their worries for their family. As Iowans, that's what's most important to us: the health of our kids, spouses, and mothers and fathers. Like each of you, that is my top concern.

Selfishly, I want school to start up so my kids can play baseball and softball. For over a decade, our family has bonded at ballparks across Iowa. For nine years, I was so fortunate to have the opportunity to coach youth sports. Looking back at it, coaching my kids has been one of the most rewarding things I've done in my life. I got to spend time with them, watch them grow, and even mentor their friends.

I'm sure that if we can't be at a diamond this summer, we'll find other ways to spend quality family time together (maybe, it'll be filling in the holes in the yard where our puppy is digging). We know that it's not always what we do together, but it's the fact that we do something together.

You probably have similar memories of you and your family. Take a few more days to slow down, spend precious time with the ones closest to you. A virus won't slow Iowans down for long. Very soon the whole state will start growing our world's food supply.

May God continue to watch over you and bless our great country.
TELL FIVE FRIENDS (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=3cc13bc332-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-3cc13bc332-25822489)
LIKE US ON FACEBOOK (http://facebook.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=3cc13bc332-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-3cc13bc332-25822489)
PUT UP A SIGN (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=3cc13bc332-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-3cc13bc332-25822489)
Email me a question (mailto:bret@RichardsForCongress.com?subject=Keeping%20in%20touch)
As always, get in touch with me at bret@richardsforcongress.com (mailto:bret@richardsforcongress.com) or (712) 579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you.

Even during these times, our campaign continues to be the most accessible to any Iowan. I truly care about what's important in your lives.

I appreciate your continued support.

Your neighbor,
p.s. We need you to keep telling more people about our campaign. As we shift to a more virtual campaign, we need you to help us spread our message on Facebook, Instagram, or however you communicate with others from home.
STAY INFORMED
